item.name: Pteranodon Horn
item.description: This horn emits a primitive tone that brings a prehistoric pteranodon soaring to your side.

mount.name: Pteranodon
mount.action: Summon forth your pteranodon, a winged scalekin that has existed since ancient times.
mount.description: In the course of feeding upon food scraps discarded at the <Emphasis>Bounty</Emphasis>, this creature grew so familiar with men as to allow riders upon its back. This goes to show that the way to a prehistoric creature's heart is through its stomach.
mount.tooltip:
With what powerful magicks
did they tame this dread fiend?
- Nashu Mhakaracca
